name: agent-saas
description: Greg Isenberg's 'AI Agents are the new SaaS' playbook as an agent skill: validate an agent-business idea, score workflows, spec the agent, anchor pricing against labor cost, and get a 30-day plan.

interface.shortDescription: Validate and spec an AI-agent business idea.
interface.longDescription: Runs Greg Isenberg's 'AI Agents are the new SaaS' playbook: scores candidate workflows on 5 traits, writes the 7-part agent spec, picks the minimal useful agent shape, anchors pricing against labor cost, and produces a 30-day plan.
